summary_from_search: Q1 2026 earnings on April 14: EPS $5.94 (beat $5.50 est), revenue $50.54B (beat $48.30B est). Dimon warned of bond market crisis on April 28. JPM raised S&P 500 year-end target to 7,600 from 7,200 on April 21. Named Global Banking Partner of LA28 Olympics. Quarterly dividend of $1.50/share paid April 30.
